creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Chris Hutchinson from comment #5)
Nothing is decided yet.

I find this kind of picky. If a certain maintainer wants _some_ issues to be reported in GitHub, so be it. But the main project's problem report database is Bugzilla.
Or should we swipe through the whole ports collection and have such a statement in pkg-descr for all the ports we have which upstream is in GitHub?
